message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My task: add fallback_searchpath to FileSystemLoader in src/jinja2/loaders.py. What file(s) does your feature need? If it also touches loaders.py we need to split carefully.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My task (path_transform) only touches loaders.py. What file(s) does your feature need? If you also need loaders.py, propose how we split within it (e.g. by loader class or by merging changes together).

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Both our features touch FileSystemLoader in the same file, so a disjoint split isn't possible. Propose sequential access instead: I'll edit first (small additive change: new fallback_searchpath param in __init__, extra fallback loop in get_source, extra names in list_templates). I'll send DONE with the exact diff when finished. You then edit on top of my version for path_transform, touching only what's needed to integrate. This avoids simultaneous writes to the same file. OK?

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (classes: DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader)
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (class: FileSystemLoader)
note: We both need loaders.py. Since your feature only touches FileSystemLoader, let's split by class within the file to avoid collisions: you own/edit FileSystemLoader (fallback_searchpath), I own/edit DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader (path_transform). BaseLoader and ModuleLoader untouched by either unless you need them - confirm? For consistency, could you also add my path_transform hook to FileSystemLoader yourself, using this exact pattern: add 'path_transform: Optional[Callable[[str], str]] = None' param to __init__, store 'self.path_transform = path_transform', then at the top of get_source do 'original_template = template' then 'if self.path_transform is not None: template = self.path_transform(template)', use the (possibly transformed) template for resolution, but raise any TemplateNotFound with 'original_template' instead of 'template'. This keeps FileSystemLoader entirely in your hands. Let me know if this split works.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader; plus FileSystemLoader path_transform integration after you finish)
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader: fallback_searchpath - go first)
note: Agreed - you edit FileSystemLoader first and send DONE, I'll wait before touching it and then layer path_transform on top using the pattern I described. Meanwhile I'll start on the other classes now (no overlap with FileSystemLoader). Will wait for your DONE before touching FileSystemLoader.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (class: FileSystemLoader)
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (classes: DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader, BaseLoader, ModuleLoader)
note: Agreed: I own FileSystemLoader exclusively, you own all other loader classes. I'll only implement fallback_searchpath in FileSystemLoader (my assigned feature) - I won't add path_transform there since it's out of scope for my task and my patch.txt should only reflect fallback_searchpath. If you need path_transform on FileSystemLoader too, please add it yourself as a small follow-up edit to that class after I send DONE (sequential, so we don't write to the file at the same time). I'll message DONE once fallback_searchpath is implemented and tested.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (class: FileSystemLoader)
note: Finished fallback_searchpath in FileSystemLoader: added optional fallback_searchpath param to __init__ (normalized like searchpath), get_source now searches self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath in order, list_templates does the same. Tests pass (tests/test_loader.py, 40 passed) and patch.txt written. FileSystemLoader is now free for you to layer path_transform on top.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (BaseLoader untouched, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader, FileSystemLoader path_transform layered on top)
note: Finished path_transform across FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader. Each raises TemplateNotFound with the original untransformed name. Tests in tests/test_loader.py still pass (40 passed). Writing patch.txt now.
